portal_description:
Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation 4.21.3 security, enhancement & bug fix update

FIXED BUGS:
==========
DFBUGS-6506: [Fusion Access] Remove Parameter filesetType = independent from VM Storageclass
DFBUGS-6417: CLONE - MDR and probably external mode deployment is blocked with latest ODF 4.22 build v4.22.0-53.stable
DFBUGS-6375: CLONE - Object storage  UI page is broken , showing error message Something wrong happened
DFBUGS-6368: [odf-4.21] Bootstrap scale must-gather from ODF must-gather
DFBUGS-6362: Backport to odf-4.21.z Noobaa POD keeps Failing when Clusterwide encryption is enabled with IBM KeyProtect on ROKS Cluster
DFBUGS-6360: ocs-client csv should scale up on the instance of storageclient CR
DFBUGS-6348: Storagecluster tab doesn't have any clickable link for configure data foundation
DFBUGS-6322: Update Blacbox Probe to get correct ips for Node Latency Alerts
DFBUGS-6313: Backport to odf-4.21.z [RDR]- Automatic creation of destination namespace with same SElinux/annotations on destination namespace
DFBUGS-6225: RHODF 4.21.3 release
DFBUGS-6017: Backport to odf-4.21.z [GSS] No public access to buckets after ODF upgrade to 4.20
DFBUGS-6001: [SDS] Fusion DF deployment fails to set resource requests/limits in Scale Cluster CR
DFBUGS-5918: [UI] Adding another scale filesystem not working correctly
DFBUGS-5885: Wrong health score showing in ODF overview
DFBUGS-5775: [FusionAceess][UI]SAN Storage System parameters not displayed on External System page
DFBUGS-5756: [Backport to 4.21.1] Missing UI for data replication separation setup
portal_solution:
Before applying this update, make sure all previously released errata
relevant to your system have been applied.

For details on how to apply this update, refer to:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_openshift_data_foundation/4.21/html/updating_openshift_data_foundation/updating-ocs-to-odf_rhodf
